titleStmt.title: SII 24.346: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 346. (A.R. No. 13 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of two villages Chaṭṭuvantāṅgal and Aṟapperuñchelvi on the southern bank of the Pālāru in Paḍaivīṭṭu-uśāvaḍi in Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam, by Kandāḍai Ayōdhyā Rāmānuja-ayyaṅgār, aśāttāda-parama ēkāṅgi of Tiruvaraṅgam-Tiruppati, to god Raṅganātha for offerings during Rāmānujayan-avasaram and to feed Śrīvaishṇava Brāhmaṇas with the donor's share of the offerings in the Rāmānuja-kūṭam situated to the west of the Pallavarāyar-maṭha, on the eastern portion of the southern row of the Vikrama-chōḷaṉ-tiruvīdi. The villages granted by the Rāyar are stated to have been acquired by the donor from their Brāhmaṇa owners. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1411, Saumya, Ṛishabha śu. 10. Sunday, Uttiram regularly correspond to A.D. 1489, May 10, Sunday. ·36, ·18.
The Kōyiloḻugu (Edited by Kṛishṇamāchāriyar in 1888 A.D., p. 69) describes the association of this Rāmānujayyaṅgār with this temple in greater details.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 10 1 ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa saumya samvatsarattu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu daśamiyum Ādityavāramum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati cāttāta parama EkāṅkiRead Ekāṅgi] kantāṭai Ayoddhyā rāmānujayaṅkār
kaiyiṅkariyamāka perumāḷ śrīraṅgarājar maddhyānna kālattil tiruvaraṅkaccelvar Eḻuntaruḷiṉa Aṉan=taramāka rāmānujayan Avasaramāka Amutuceytaruḷum campāt taḷikai nālukku Amutupaṭi kaṟiyamutu paruppamutu teṅkā
yamutu paḻavamutu neyyamutu Uṭpaṭṭa pala kaṭṭaḷaippaṭikkumāka toṇṭai maṇḍalattu paṭaivīṭṭu Ucāvaṭi pālāṟṟukkut teṉkarai Irāyar dhārāpūrvaudakamākak kuṭutta sarvamānnya Agrahāramāy brāhmaṇar kaiyyil kantāṭai
Ayoddhyā rāmānujayaṅkār koṇṭu cetta caṭṭuvantāṅkal Ūr Oṉṟu Aṟapperuñcelvi Ūr Oṉṟu Āka Ūr Iraṇṭukkum catussīmaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey nattañ ceyttalait tiṭar Erikuḷan turavumaṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭatum sarva
mānnyamāka candrādityavaraiyum perumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattile Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Inta Ūrkaḷil mutalākiṟa mutalkoṇṭu nāḷ toṟum nālutaḷikaiyum perumāḷ Amutuceytaruḷi Itile Oru taḷikai prasātam kantāṭai Ayoddhyā rāmānuja- yaṅkāṟku
perumāḷ tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷukaiyil Inta Orutaḷikai prasātamum nāḷtoṟum vantu vikramacoḻaṉ tiruviti teṟkut tiruviti kiḻtuṇṭattu pallavarāyar maṭattukku meṟku rāmānujayaṅkār rāmānujakūṭattile śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceyyum paṭikku
cāttāta parama Ekān=ti kan=tāṭai Ayoddhyā rāmānujayaṅkār śiṣyapārampariyamāka candrādityavaraiyum naṭatta kaṭavatu Ākavum . §
Digital edition of SII 24.346 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
